sessions.title: Opening & Week 2 Reflection
sessions.description: Welcome rookies and review Week 2 Customer Discovery outcomes.
activities: Squad check-in: share one customer insight from Week 2
Facilitator recap: how FEC blocks 1-3 become the foundation
Preview today's focus: completing the canvas

sessions.title: FEC Blocks 4-6 Overview
sessions.description: Introduction to Capture Value, Enable Value, and Unified Venture Proposition.
keyPoints: Capture Value: Revenue streams, cost structure, profit model
Enable Value: Key resources, partners, funding
UVP: Your unique position in the market

sessions.title: Canvas Design Studio
sessions.description: Guided canvas completion with facilitator support and squad feedback.
activities: Individual work: Canvas wizard blocks 4-6 (30 min)
Squad peer review: each rookie shares one block (30 min)

sessions.title: Canvas Synthesis
sessions.description: Review complete FEC and prepare for Week 4 pitch.
activities: Q&A on revenue models and cost structures
Preview Week 4: 3-Year Plan and Stage Gate 1

sessions.title: Assignment & Closing
sessions.description: Clarify Week 3 assignment and next steps.
activities: Complete canvas wizard if not finished in class

facilitatorNotes: Rookies should arrive with their Week 2 FEC blocks visible. Be prepared to troubleshoot canvas wizard issues and provide examples from real advisory practices.
